text: Being here, I am filled with a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass-walled meeting room, with its vacant chairs and projected screen, invites reflection on knowledge and communal exchange. Moving into the exhibition space, the vibrant walls and thoughtful displays on research and human coexistence inspire me to ponder the intersection of innovation and meaning. I feel both the weight of human aspiration and the lightness of possibility—intrigued by the quiet hum of purpose in these carefully curated spaces.
